name: test-case-author
description: Write tests that actually catch bugs, not tests that go green while the feature is broken in production. Drives the real shipped artifact (never a reimplementation), asserts the behavior/content contract (not liveness), proves red-before-green, hunts swallowed failures, contract-tests the boundaries you don't control, and verifies the fix in the shipped build and production telemetry. Language- and framework-agnostic.
